newsroomStories.title: Revisiting the 2024–2025 Deborah and Kenneth Novack Creative Citizens Series
newsroomStories.listingTitle: Revisiting the 2024–2025 Deborah and Kenneth Novack Creative Citizens Series
newsroomStories.summary: The 2024–2025 CCA@CCA program explored the theme "Where do we go from here?" During a time of instability and conflict in the world around us, our programs modeled ways to come together for discussion, reflection, and growth.

image.alt: Take Action exhibition at the Novack Gallery.
